scents.description: Breathing in cold air, soft snowstorm, notes of cool mint, ozone, and watery melon
Warm hay, farm animals, hint of fresh country air
Freshly baked treat with notes of vanilla, cream, and chocolate
Wandering through a flower garden, catching wafts of different blooms
Relaxing in the sand with hints of sunscreen and coconut
The warmth of human connection with gentle notes of baby powder and soothing lavender
Grey skies before a storm, rain hitting pavement, scent of drenched streets
Ocean spray and seaweed tangled in coastal vegetation with weathered driftwood
Exploring deep forests with notes of pine trees and lush greenery
Fresh dirt, earthy minerals, wet moss, cold deep forest rivers with hints of plants
Fresh citrus from a tree - bright, ripe, zesty with lemon, orange, and grapefruit
Dry, herbal, desert heat and sand
A medley of spices for savory dishes - coriander, ginger, black pepper, paprika
Dried wood, entering a lumber yard with notes of sandalwood and cedarwood
The crackling of a campfire with creosote and cedarwood
Diesel fuel, industrial parts of cities, slightly sulfurous
